title: selinum suffruticosum
intro: Selinum suffruticosum, also known as wild celery, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Selinum suffruticosum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
